description_for_human: Research corpus of Northern Thai (Lanna) manuscripts and the living wichaa tradition.
description_for_model: Read-only, CC-BY 4.0 corpus of Northern Thai (Lanna) manuscripts, synthesised subject articles, a curated knowledge graph, and a living amulet-market layer. To answer questions, query the JSON API in the OpenAPI spec (start at /api/index.json). Facts are recomputed from a catalogue, not authored, so they are safe to cite with attribution.
